campaign.title: Set Up Your Lead Tracking
campaign.subject: Let modern tools handle your initial customer conversations
campaign.description: Configure lead tracking so every inquiry is captured and tracked

landing_page.ai_goal: Guide user through lead tracking setup

slides.title: lead management Setup

content.headline: Let modern tools Handle Initial Customer Conversations

expectations.outcome: modern tools answering inquiries within seconds, 24/7

slides.narration: In the next twenty minutes, you'll set up an search tools that handles initial customer conversations twenty-four seven. It answers instantly, qualifies leads, and hands off to you when a human is needed. Let's build your always-on sales team.

slides.title: What lead management Can Do
slides.narration: Here's what your lead management assistant can handle. Answer common questions—hours, pricing, availability. Qualify leads—understand their budget, timeline, and needs. Schedule appointments—directly connecting to your calendar. Provide information—about your services, products, and process. And hand off to humans—when questions get complex or someone's ready to buy. You handle the relationships. modern tools handles the volume.

slides.title: Step 1: Enable lead management

content.headline: Step 1: Turn On lead management Assistant
content.location: Dashboard → modern tools → Sales Assistant → Enable
initial_setup: Choose your modern tools personality (Professional, Friendly, or Custom)
content.note: modern tools starts with basic capabilities; we'll customize next

slides.narration: Step one: Enable your lead management Assistant. Go to Dashboard, modern tools, Sales Assistant, and click Enable. Toggle the assistant to on. Select response speed—instant is recommended, but you can add a delay if preferred. Choose your modern tools personality—professional, friendly, or custom. The modern tools starts with basic capabilities. We'll customize it for your business next.

slides.title: Step 2: Train on Your Business

content.headline: Step 2: Teach modern tools About Your Business
content.tip: The more you teach it, the better it performs

slides.narration: Step two: Train the modern tools on your business. It needs to know what you know. First, let it scan your website—this happens automatically. Then upload your FAQ document if you have one. Add your service descriptions—import or add manually. Include pricing information—at least ranges if not exact prices. The more you teach it, the better it performs. Don't worry about perfection—you can refine later.

slides.title: Step 3: Set Qualification Questions

content.headline: Step 3: Define Lead Qualification

qualification_questions.question: What service are you interested in?
What's the best way to reach you?

content.customization: Add questions specific to your business
content.scoring: Optionally set up lead scoring based on answers

slides.narration: Step three: Set your qualification questions. These help modern tools understand who's a good fit. Basic questions: What service are they interested in? What's their timeline? What's their approximate budget? Best way to reach them? Add questions specific to your business. You can also set up lead scoring—automatically ranking leads based on their answers so you prioritize the best ones.

slides.title: Step 4: Configure Handoffs

content.headline: Step 4: When Does modern tools Hand Off to You?

handoff_triggers.trigger: Complex questions your account team can't answer

content.notification_options: Email, SMS, App notification, or all three

slides.narration: Step four: Configure when modern tools hands off to you. Ready-to-buy signals—modern tools recognizes these and notifies you immediately. Complex questions your account team can't answer—it escalates instead of guessing. Customer requests human—instant transfer, no questions asked. High-value lead detected—priority notification. Choose how you want to be notified: email, SMS, app notification, or all three. You stay in control of what matters.

slides.title: Step 5: Test and Refine

content.headline: Step 5: Test Your search tools
content.refinement: Review conversations weekly; add training as needed
content.tip: modern tools improves over time as it learns from real conversations

slides.narration: Step five: Test and refine. Before going live, test your modern tools. Ask common questions—does it answer correctly? Ask edge cases—does it handle gracefully or escalate? Request a human—does it hand off properly? Complete a full qualification flow—does it capture information correctly? After launch, review conversations weekly. Add training as needed. modern tools improves over time as it learns from real conversations.

slides.title: Activate lead management

content.headline: Ready for 24/7 Sales Coverage?
content.summary: Enable → Train → Qualify → Handoff → Go Live
content.result: Never miss another inquiry. Even at 3am.

slides.narration: Ready for twenty-four seven sales coverage? Enable, train, set qualification, configure handoffs, go live. Click 'Set Up lead management' to start now, or watch a demo first if you want to see it in action. The result: you'll never miss another inquiry, even at three in the morning. Your lead management assistant is ready.

email_tutorial.subject: Track every inquiry your business gets — 20-minute setup
email_tutorial.body:
Hi [First Name],

How many inquiries have you missed because there was no system to track them?

20-minute setup:

→ See every inquiry in one place
→ Get instant notifications
→ Track which ones convert
→ Know which sources send you the best leads

[SET UP LEAD TRACKING →]

Once it's running, you'll wonder how you managed without it.

[AM Name]
[Community Name] Day.News
